zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas II Lord of Werle於1275年之前出生時，他的父親John I Lord of Werle38歲，母親Sophia of Lindow-Ruppin36歲。他於1292年與Richiza Eriksdatter of Denmark結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1292年被列為herr zu werle。他去世於1316年2月18日在德國福萊斯塔阿特 梅可倫波-史維林斯塔特 居斯特洛福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas II Lord of Werle于1275年之前出生时，他的父亲John I Lord of Werle38岁，母亲Sophia of Lindow-Ruppin36岁。他于1292年与Richiza Eriksdatter of Denmark结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1292年被列为herr zu werle。他去世于1316年2月18日在德国福萊斯塔阿特 梅可倫波-史維林斯塔特 居斯特洛福。

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas II Lord of Werle was born before 1275, his father, John I Lord of Werle, was 38 and his mother, Sophia of Lindow-Ruppin, was 36. He married Richiza Eriksdatter of Denmark in 1292. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. In 1292, his occupation is listed as herr zu werle. He died on 18 February 1316, in Güstrow, Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas II Lord of Werle est né avant 1275, son père, John I Lord of Werle, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Sophia of Lindow-Ruppin, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Richiza Eriksdatter of Denmark en 1292. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. En 1292, sa profession de son indiquée est herr zu werle. Il est décédé le 18 février 1316, à Stadt Güstrow, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas II Lord of Werle vor 1275 geboren wurde, war sein Vater John I Lord of Werle 38 und seine Mutter Sophia of Lindow-Ruppin 36. Er hat 1292 Richiza Eriksdatter of Denmark geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. 1292 ist sein Beruf als herr zu werle aufgeführt. Er starb am 18. Februar 1316 in Stadt Güstrow, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas II Lord of Werle è nato il prima del 1275, il suo padre, John I Lord of Werle, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Sophia of Lindow-Ruppin, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Richiza Eriksdatter of Denmark nel 1292. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Nel 1292, la sua occupazione è indicata come herr zu werle. Morì il 18 febbraio 1316, nel Stadt Güstrow, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas II Lord of Werleが1275年以前に生まれた時，父John I Lord of Werleは38歳，母Sophia of Lindow-Ruppinは36歳であった。1292年にRichiza Eriksdatter of Denmarkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1292年，職業はherr zu werleと記録されている。彼は1316年2月18日にドイツフレイスタアト メックレンブルグ-スチウエリンスタト グuストローで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas II Lord of Werle(이)가 1275년 이전에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John I Lord of Werle(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Sophia of Lindow-Ruppin(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1292년 Richiza Eriksdatter of Denmark(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1292년, 그의 직업은 herr zu werle이었다. 그는 1316년 2월 18일 독일 프레이스타앳 클렌버그-슈워인 스타드트 그u스트로에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas II Lord of Werle nasceu antes 1275, seu pai, John I Lord of Werle, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Sophia of Lindow-Ruppin, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Richiza Eriksdatter of Denmark em 1292. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Em 1292, sua profissão aparece como herr zu werle. Ele faleceu em 18 de fevereiro de 1316, em Stadt Güstrow, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas II Lord of Werle родился перед 1275 г., его отцу по имени John I Lord of Werle было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Sophia of Lindow-Ruppin, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Richiza Eriksdatter of Denmark в 1292 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1292 году он работал по профессии herr zu werle. Он умер 18 февраля 1316 г. в местности стадт гuстроу, фристаат меккленбург-щвирин, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas II Lord of Werle nació antes de 1275, su papá, John I Lord of Werle, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Sophia of Lindow-Ruppin, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Richiza Eriksdatter of Denmark en 1292. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. En 1292, su ocupación registrada era herr zu werle. Murió el 18 de febrero de 1316, en Stadt Güstrow, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Alemania.
